item.title: MLflow 推送自定义跟踪属性以实现细粒度 GenAI 代理可观察性
item.summary: MLflow announced searchable custom trace attributes for GenAI agent observability — covering top-k, cache hits, query length, tier level, feature flags, and data source versions — enabling fine-grained, queryable instrumentation of agentic workflows via its OpenTelemetry-compatible tracing infrastructure.
